scripts.test: cd ../.. && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-feed FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 ./tests/firebase-rules/node_modules/.bin/firebase emulators:exec --project demo-runiac-feed --only auth,firestore,functions,storage "node tests/firebase-rules/feed.emulator.guard.mjs && cd tests/firebase-rules && node --test firestore.rules.test.mjs firestore.catalog.rules.test.mjs firestore.routes-enrollment.rules.test.mjs challenge.firestore.rules.test.mjs feed.*.test.mjs"
scripts.test:feed: cd ../.. && GCLOUD_PROJECT=demo-runiac-feed FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FUNCTIONS_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:5001 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 ./tests/firebase-rules/node_modules/.bin/firebase emulators:exec --project demo-runiac-feed --only auth,firestore,functions,storage "node tests/firebase-rules/feed.emulator.guard.mjs && cd tests/firebase-rules && node --test feed.*.test.mjs"
